formulas.name: 1. Earnings Per Share (EPS)
formulas.formula: EPS = (Net Profit - Preference Share Dividend) / Number of Equity Shares
formulas.variables: Net Profit, Preference Share Dividend, Number of Equity Shares
formulas.notes: To calculate the profit earned by the company on each equity share

formulas.name: 2. Dividend Per Share
formulas.formula: Dividend Per Share = (Total Dividend / Number of Equity Shares)
formulas.variables: Total Dividend, Number of Equity Shares
formulas.notes: To calculate the dividend paid to each equity shareholder

formulas.name: 3. Return on Investment (ROI) or Return on Equity (ROE)
formulas.formula: ROI/ROE = (Net Profit / Total Investment or Shareholders' Funds) * 100
formulas.variables: Net Profit, Total Investment or Shareholders' Funds
formulas.notes: To evaluate the return generated by the investment

formulas.name: 4. Debt-Equity Ratio
formulas.formula: Debt-Equity Ratio = Total Debt / Total Shareholders' Funds
formulas.notes: To assess the company's leverage and financial risk

formulas.name: 5. Current Ratio
formulas.formula: Current Ratio = Current Assets / Current Liabilities
formulas.notes: To evaluate the company's liquidity and ability to meet short-term obligations

formulas.name: 6. Quick Ratio or Acid Test Ratio
formulas.formula: Quick Ratio = (Current Assets - Inventory) / Current Liabilities
formulas.notes: To assess the company's ability to meet short-term obligations without relying on inventory

formulas.name: 7. Capital Gearing Ratio
formulas.formula: Capital Gearing Ratio = (Preference Share Capital + Debentures + Long-term Loans) / (Equity Share Capital + Reserves and Surplus)
formulas.variables: Preference Share Capital, Debentures, Long-term Loans, Equity Share Capital, Reserves and Surplus
formulas.notes: To evaluate the company's capital structure and financial leverage

formulas.name: 8. Interest Coverage Ratio
formulas.formula: Interest Coverage Ratio = Earnings Before Interest and Taxes (EBIT) / Interest on Debt
formulas.notes: To assess the company's ability to meet interest payments on its debt

formulas.name: 9. Operating Profit Ratio
formulas.formula: Operating Profit Ratio = (Operating Profit / Net Sales) * 100
formulas.notes: To evaluate the company's operating efficiency and profitability

formulas.name: 10. Net Profit Ratio
formulas.formula: Net Profit Ratio = (Net Profit / Net Sales) * 100
formulas.notes: To assess the company's overall profitability
